MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF NANCY LOPEZ's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

The unopposed motion to admit counsel (Richard Stoloff) pro hac vice is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Courts ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Sep-06-2024 Continued To Sep-19-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Elise R. Sanguinetti, Esq. of Arias Sanguinetti, Tel. 925.683.7604, appearing for the Plaintiff Nancy Lopez;
Richard A. Stoloff, Esq. of the Law Offices of Richard A. Stoloff, Tel. 609.601.2233, also appearing.

Hearing re: PLAINTIFF NANCY LOPEZ's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

The matter is contested. Ms. Sanquinetti addresses the courtesy copies and states that a set of the moving papers was delivered yesterday afternoon. Brief discussions are held.

The Court notes the late delivery of the courtesy copies, vacates its tentative ruling, and continues the motion to Thursday, September 19, 2024, at 9:30 a.m. on the Law & Motion calendar.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Bailiff: Nguyen. (301/RCE)
